titleStmt.title: SII 26.325: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 325. (A.R. No. 307 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same Prākāra.

This inscription records that on deciding to levy the tax of āṭṭiṟaippāṭṭam from the maṉṟāḍis of (the district) of Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu, it was fixed by the Government that they should pay the grazing charges at the rate of one paṇam for every 10 cows, one paṇam for every 5 buffaloes and one paṇam for every 50 sheep. It was also decided that the total tax amounts should be collected every month without fail, and that new families (of maṉṟāḍis) agreeing to pay this tax would be permitted. The signatory was Sundarapāṇḍya Kaṇḍayadēvaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 11 vatu Iraṇṭāyira veli
paṟṟil maṉṟāṭikaḷai Āṭṭiṟaippāṭṭakkaṭamai koḷḷa niccayittapaṭi payirkaṇṭu kaṭamaikoḷḷum Iṭa
ttu vaḷaikkaṉṟuṅkuṭṭiyum meya Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku pattu māṭṭukku Oru paṇamum Añcu Erumaikku Oru paṇamum
Aimpatu Āṭṭukku Oru paṇamum Āka vanta paṇam mātaviḻukkāṭṭile koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku pukutu
ṅ kuṭiyum pukutaviṭuvatākac coṉṉom Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiya kaṇṭayatevaṉ Eḻuttu Itu Ulakkiṉa I
vaṉ keṅkai karaikkurāṟ pacuk koṉṟāṉ pāvaṅ koḷvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 26.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
